canonical_definition: The Web of Science dataset (WOS-46985), a benchmark for hierarchical text classification containing scientific abstracts with a 2-level hierarchy of research areas and sub-areas.
papers: Evaluating and Aligning Human Economic Risk Preferences inLLMs
FB-Bench: A Fine-Grained Multi-Task Benchmark for EvaluatingLLMs’ Responsiveness to Human Feedback

relationships.paper: Evaluating and Aligning Human Economic Risk Preferences inLLMs
relationships.evidence: For hierarchical text classification (HTC), we employ four widely used benchmark datasets as presented in Table 2. ... WOS-46985 (WOS) (Kowsari et al., 2017) contains scientific abstracts from the Web of Science with a 2-level hierarchy of research areas and sub-areas. (Section 4.1)
